title: Point of Sale Web Platform
description: A web platform developed for a shoe store, with a realtime window-based interface, complete inventory control and custom tools like barcode, QR and tickets generator.

images.alt: Admin dashboard with products, sales and orders metrics
QR code tag creator with custom position, text size multiple template layouts
Point of sale for cash register
Multi-window interface for fast access to tools

title: Dinotext
description: Dinotext is a markup language, inspired by Markdown, which is the engine powering my main website (adriandomc.com). It is currently in a very early stage, but I have plans to make it a more formal markup language with real-world applications.
